creator: tanawts@gmail.com
text:
I am getting reports of build failures due to patch-makenet.

Please note my comments in my original patch to 3.2.10.1:
"Notice that it removes unreal/files/patch-makenet so please be sure to
apply with: patch -E < patch.txt"

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=177506

It sounds like the update may have been applied without -E


On Sun, Sep 29, 2013 at 2:40 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of irc/unreal,
>
> Please note that PR ports/182456 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/182456
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
